home.badge: Build career skills, one chapter at a time
home.subheading: Koushol turns career-skill courses into interactive chapters and quizzes — read, get tested, unlock the next step, and earn a certificate when you finish.

read.title: Read a chapter
read.description: Bite-sized lessons, one topic at a time — no wall of text to get through.

quiz.title: Take the quiz
quiz.description: Prove you understood it before moving on — 70% to pass, retake anytime.

unlock.title: Unlock the next step
unlock.description: Progress locks sequentially, so you can't skip ahead of what you know.

aiCourse.title: AI-assisted course creation
aiCourse.description: Teachers turn raw notes into structured chapters and quizzes automatically.

audio.title: Listen to any chapter
audio.description: Bengali and multi-language narration, generated per chapter.

sequential.title: Sequential unlocking
sequential.description: Chapters and quizzes gate progress, so learning actually builds up.

teachers.title: Built for teachers too
teachers.description: Publish courses, track student progress, and see quiz performance per chapter.

home.ctaSubtitle: Browse the catalog — the first chapter of every course is free to read.

auth.createAccountSubtitle: Free to browse, free to start learning.
auth.name: Name

notFoundPage.title: Page not found
notFoundPage.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.draftBanner: Draft, not legal advice. This is standard boilerplate written to match Koushol's current features. It has not been reviewed by a lawyer and should be reviewed by one before it's relied on for real users or payments.

what.title: 1. What Koushol is
what.body: Koushol is an online learning platform. Students browse courses, read chapters, take quizzes, and track progress. Teachers create and publish courses, which an administrator reviews before they go live to students.

accounts.title: 2. Accounts
accounts.body: You need an account to enroll in courses, track progress, or publish content. You're responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for activity under your account. New accounts default to the student role — teacher and admin access is granted by an administrator, not self-service.

content.title: 3. Teacher-submitted content
content.body: Teachers are responsible for the accuracy and originality of the courses they submit, including any chapters generated with the AI course-creation tool. Koushol reviews submissions before publishing but does not independently verify factual accuracy. Don't upload content you don't have the rights to.

payments.title: 4. Payments
payments.body: Paid courses and payment processing (bKash, Nagad, SSLCommerz) are planned but not live yet. This section will be updated with real payment, refund, and cancellation terms before that ships — don't rely on it as final until then.

use.title: 5. Acceptable use
use.body: Don't use Koushol to harass others, upload unlawful content, attempt to bypass access controls, or interfere with the service. We can suspend accounts that violate this.

changes.title: 6. Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms as the product changes (see Section 4 above for a concrete example). Material changes will update the "last updated" date.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms — contact the Koushol team directly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.draftBanner: Draft, not legal advice. This describes what Koushol's code actually does today. It has not been reviewed by a lawyer and should be before it's relied on for real users, especially around Bangladesh-specific data protection requirements.

collect.title: What we collect
collect.account: Account info: name, email, and role (student/teacher/admin).
collect.activity: Learning activity: enrollments, which chapters you've unlocked, and quiz scores.
collect.teacher: For teachers: course content you write, and raw notes you submit to the AI course-generation tool.

storage.title: Where it's stored and processed
storage.intro: Account data and course content are stored in Supabase (our database and authentication provider). Sign-in sessions are kept in your browser's local storage, not third-party tracking cookies.
storage.aiIntro: Two AI providers process specific content on request, not continuously:
storage.groq: Groq — processes a teacher's raw notes when they use "Generate with AI" to draft chapters and quizzes.
storage.sarvam: Sarvam AI — processes a chapter's text when a teacher generates audio narration for it.
storage.fonts: Fonts are loaded from Google Fonts, which — like any CDN — receives your IP address when your browser requests them.

payments.title: Payments
payments.body: Not live yet. Once bKash/Nagad/SSLCommerz integration ships (Phase 6), this section will describe what payment data those providers receive — treat this page as incomplete on that topic until then.

access.title: Access control
access.body: Your data is protected by database-level access rules (Row Level Security), not just app-level checks — students can only see their own progress, teachers can only see students enrolled in their own courses, and platform-wide access is limited to admins.

choices.title: Your choices
choices.body: Contact the Koushol team to request a copy of your data or account deletion. Note that this is a manual process today — there's no self-service export/delete flow yet.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about this policy — contact the Koushol team directly.

courses.title: Courses
courses.emptyState: No published courses yet — check back soon.

browse.title: Browse courses
browse.description: Explore the catalog — the first topic of every course is free to read, no sign-up needed.

enroll.title: Enroll and read freely
enroll.description: Once enrolled, read every topic in an unlocked module in any order — nothing is locked topic by topic.

quiz.title: Pass the module quiz
quiz.description: Each module ends with a quiz. Pass it (70%+) to unlock the next module.

progress.title: Track your progress
progress.description: Your dashboard always shows how far you've gotten in every course you're enrolled in.
